_metadata.description: Per-subject anthropometric registry. Single source of truth for researcher-provided height and weight.
_metadata.usage: Loaded by run_pipeline.py before each CSV run. Values injected into config_v1.yaml as subject_height_cm / subject_mass_kg.
_metadata.fallback_chain: Registry (measured) > Step 05 mocap estimate > Default (70kg, skeleton-derived height)

671.notes: Fill in measured values before running pipeline. Mocap estimate ~153.6 cm from step 05.

651.notes: Fill in measured values before running pipeline. Mocap estimate ~153.6 cm from step 05.
